title: Schema + directory restructure: directive dirs, project nesting, terminology

tasks.title: Migrate directives from flat files to directory structure

dod.criterion: Active/in-progress directives migrated to .context/directives/{id}/directive.json + directive.md
Completed directives with both .json and .md migrated to directory format
directive-watcher.ts reads ONLY {name}/directive.json (no flat file fallback)
directive-watcher.ts chokidar depth updated to watch inside directive directories
Old checkpoints/ subdirectory removed
npm run type-check passes

tasks.title: Update directive.json schema: kill initiatives[], add projects, awaiting_completion

dod.criterion: directive-json.md schema has projects[] (references with id + status) instead of initiatives[]
Status enum includes awaiting_completion
initiatives[], phases, phases_completed, current_phase removed from schema
Pipeline steps include brainstorm, project-brainstorm, and completion
No remaining references to 'initiatives' in directive-json.md
Schema example is valid JSON

tasks.title: Update current.json schema: replace initiatives with projects

dod.criterion: current-json.md uses totalProjects, currentProject, projects[] — zero mentions of initiative
Status enum includes awaiting_completion
Schema example is valid JSON

tasks.title: Update morgan-plan.md schema: initiatives become projects, no tasks in Morgan output

dod.criterion: morgan-plan.md uses projects[] as top-level array, not initiatives[]
Project objects include: id, title, priority, scope_summary, complexity, agent, reviewers, brief
Project objects do NOT include definition_of_done or tasks (Step 3c produces those)
No remaining references to initiatives in morgan-plan.md

tasks.title: Update TypeScript types: DirectiveInitiative → DirectiveProject everywhere

dod.criterion: DirectiveInitiative renamed to DirectiveProject in server/types.ts and src/stores/types.ts
DirectiveState uses totalProjects, currentProject, projects[] in both files
DirectiveState.status includes awaiting_completion
DirectiveProject has totalTasks and completedTasks fields
DirectiveRecord.initiatives renamed to projects in work-item-types.ts and state-watcher.ts
directive-watcher.ts validates parsed.projects instead of parsed.initiatives
npm run type-check passes with zero errors
Zero references to DirectiveInitiative, totalInitiatives, or currentInitiative in any .ts/.tsx file

tasks.title: Update pipeline step definitions in watcher for new pipeline

dod.criterion: FULL_PIPELINE_STEPS includes brainstorm, project-brainstorm, and completion steps
SKIPPED_STEPS updated for each weight class
Completion step gets needsAction=true when directive status is awaiting_completion
npm run type-check passes
